name: VERIFY_MATH_WORKFLOW
description: Comprehensive mathematical verification workflow for GNOSTICA. Runs test suites, verifies mathematical identities, audits rule consistency, validates corpus coverage, and detects regressions. Triggered by phrase 'VERIFY_MATH_WORKFLOW'. Produces unified verification report.

on_engage: QUEEN reads this JSON in full
QUEEN reads all WORKER_*.md files in this directory
QUEEN reports: 'VERIFY_MATH_WORKFLOW engaged. Mode: {mode}. Ready to verify GNOSTICA mathematical correctness.'
If mode=full: run all phases sequentially with Phase 2 parallel
If mode=specific: run only that phase

relationship_to_other_workflows.contract: VERIFY_MATH_WORKFLOW validates that GNOSTICA rules are mathematically correct. It runs AFTER implementation phases to ensure quality. If issues found, can trigger SDLC_WORKFLOW to fix them.

PHASE_1_TEST_SWEEP.name: Test Sweep
PHASE_1_TEST_SWEEP.description: Run all tests, produce structured report with categorization
PHASE_1_TEST_SWEEP.pass_condition: all tests pass OR only known-skip tests fail

PHASE_2_VERIFICATION.name: Parallel Verification
PHASE_2_VERIFICATION.description: Run identity checks, rule audit, and corpus validation in parallel

PHASE_3_REGRESSION.name: Regression Detection
PHASE_3_REGRESSION.description: Compare current results against stored baseline

PHASE_4_SYNTHESIS.name: Report Synthesis
PHASE_4_SYNTHESIS.description: Merge all reports into unified verification report
PHASE_4_SYNTHESIS.action: Determine final verdict, produce unified report

QUEEN.description: Claude in main conversation. Orchestrates phases, spawns workers, synthesizes results.
responsibilities: Execute phases in order (with Phase 2 parallel)

TEST_SWEEP.description: Runs all tests, categorizes results, identifies failures

RULE_AUDITOR.description: Static analysis of rule files for consistency

VERIFIED.condition: All phases pass with no Critical/High issues
VERIFIED.action: Report success. Update baseline if requested. Safe to release.

ISSUES_FOUND.action: Report issues with details. Optionally trigger SDLC_WORKFLOW to create fix tasks. May release with known issues documented.

CRITICAL_FAILURE.condition: Critical or High severity issues found
CRITICAL_FAILURE.action: BLOCK release. Trigger SDLC_WORKFLOW with mandatory fixes. Require re-verification after fixes.

CRITICAL.description: Mathematically incorrect results, data corruption, crashes

HIGH.description: Significant functionality broken, major identity violations

MEDIUM.description: Minor functionality issues, non-critical identity edge cases

baseline.update_policy: Manual trigger after VERIFIED verdict. Never auto-update.
